name: You Are The Leader Of The Union Of Soviet Socialist Republics (1979)
description:
This is part one of my Leader Series, a series of bots in which you assume the role of the leader of different nations and varying stages in their history. First up, the U.S.S.R.

Vnimaniye, tovarishch! The year is 1979 at the height of the second wave of the Cold War. It's up to you as the glorious leader of the Soviet Union to navigate this tumultuous period of Soviet history and ultimately go down in the annals of history as the victor of the Cold War! Are you ready?

Today's Fact: The Soviet Union had a total territory of 22.4 million square kilometers, and a population of 286.7 million according to the 1989 census.
creator: Willow Wife
